title: CT10 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.BranchContext
internalDeclarations.docString:
The inherited state of one branch, shared by dependent CT inputs and route
triggers.

internalDeclarations.type: Type (max (uAmbient + 1) (uBranch + 1))
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem
internalDeclarations.docString:
Mathematical data shared by every tactic in one structural-exhaustion
proof instance.

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT10.Capability P → Type uDatum
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.Capability.Datum

internalDeclarations.type: Type u → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.OrderedCollection
internalDeclarations.docString:
A finite ordered collection, without the claim that it contains every
inhabitant of its element type.

This is intentionally a duplicate-free list rather than a `Finset`: first-hit
machine semantics consume its order.  All set-like reasoning should pass
through Mathlib's `List`/`Finset` API instead of adding another collection
implementation here.

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT10.Capability P} →
    Core.BranchContext P → Core.OrderedCollection capability.Datum → CT10.Input capability
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.Input.mk

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.Capability.Class

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → List α → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult
internalDeclarations.docString: Search evidence relative to an arbitrary finite list.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result
internalDeclarations.docString: The result of exhaustive search over an exact finite universe.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (xs : List α) → (p : α → Prop) → ((value : α) → Decidable (p value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (enumeration : FinEnum α) (p : α → Prop),
  (∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) → ∀ (value : α), ¬p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (enumeration : FinEnum α) →
    (p : α → Prop) →
      (motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p → Sort u_2) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((absentProof : ∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent absentProof)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search.match_1

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {capability : CT10.Capability P} → CT10.DirectAbsent capability → CT10.DirectDecision capability
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.DirectDecision.absent

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.DirectDecision.found

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT10.Capability P} →
    {input : CT10.Input capability} →
      CT10.DirectAbsent capability →
        (missing : CT10.MissingDatum capability input) →
          (promotion : capability.Promotion) →
            promotion = capability.promote missing.cls → CT10.PromotedResidual capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.PromotedResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {capability : CT10.Capability P} {input : CT10.Input capability},
  CT10.DirectAbsent capability →
    (∀ (cls : capability.Class), ∃ datum, datum ∈ CT10.row capability input cls) →
      CT10.ExhaustiveCertificate capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.ExhaustiveCertificate.mk

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of local data records classified by CT10.
presentation.label: Local datum

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of classes used to partition local data.
presentation.label: Refinement class

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of application-specific residuals produced from a missing class.
presentation.label: Promotion payload

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all refinement classes.
presentation.label: Finite class enumeration

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns each local datum to its exact refinement class.
presentation.label: Datum classifier

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that class c closes the branch without promotion.
presentation.label: Directly closing class

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a refinement class closes directly.
presentation.label: Directness decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT10.Capability P) → (cls : self.Class) → Decidable (self.Direct cls)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.Capability.directDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Converts the first missing nondirect class into its downstream promotion payload.
presentation.label: Class promotion

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT10.Capability P) → (input : CT10.Input capability) → CT10.ExecutionResult capability input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT10.Capability P) (input : CT10.Input capability),
  CT10.Outcome.Valid capability input (CT10.run capability input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT10.Capability P) (input : CT10.Input capability),
  CT10.Graph.ValidTrace capability input (CT10.ExecutionResult.trace capability input (CT10.run capability input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT10.Capability P) (input : CT10.Input capability),
  ∃ r,
    CT10.Outcome.Valid capability input r.outcome ∧
      CT10.Graph.ValidTrace capability input (CT10.ExecutionResult.trace capability input r)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT10.Capability P) (input : CT10.Input capability)
  (l r : CT10.ExecutionResult capability input), l = CT10.run capability input → r = CT10.run capability input → l = r
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT10.Capability P) (input : CT10.Input capability)
  (result : CT10.ExecutionResult capability input),
  result.terminal = CT10.Graph.Terminal.direct ∨
    result.terminal = CT10.Graph.Terminal.promoted ∨ result.terminal = CT10.Graph.Terminal.exhaustive
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.residualKindContracts

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of local data records classified by CT10.
presentation.label: Local datum

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of classes used to partition local data.
presentation.label: Refinement class

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of application-specific residuals produced from a missing class.
presentation.label: Promotion payload

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all refinement classes.
presentation.label: Finite class enumeration

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns each local datum to its exact refinement class.
presentation.label: Datum classifier

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that class c closes the branch without promotion.
presentation.label: Directly closing class

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a refinement class closes directly.
presentation.label: Directness decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT10.Capability P) → (cls : self.Class) → Decidable (self.Direct cls)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT10.Capability.directDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Converts the first missing nondirect class into its downstream promotion payload.
presentation.label: Class promotion
